title: Drebble
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|a pirate associated with [[Tirog]]|[[Barpotomous Drebble/Legends|Barpotomous Drebble]], a rival of [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] who became a hero of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]}}
'''Drebble''' was a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who associated with the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Tirog]], Tirog's [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] [[GT-9R]], and a child calling himself "[[Ace (kid)|Ace]]."<ref name="Second Edition">[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'', Second Edition]]</ref>

Drebble once visited an open-air marketplace on a world with a bright blue [[Star/Legends|sun]] with Tirog, Ace, and GT-9R. During this visit, they were accosted by a [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]] accompanied by two armed thugs, who had been pursuing the group for some time. As the gambler and his cronies fired on the foursome, Drebble hesitated, and neither returned fire nor sought cover.<ref name="Second Edition" />

Drebble frequently found himself trying to repair [[Starship/Legends|starships]] or [[Droid/Legends|droids]], sometimes in emergencies. At one time, he had to repair a [[Power coupling/Legends|power coupling]] on Tirog's ship at double speed in order to hurry them offworld.<ref name="Second Edition" /> He ran into the same problem at another time when trying to repair a ship belonging to another bounty hunter named [[Thannik]].<ref name="Revised and Expanded">''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''</ref>

At some point, Drebble learned a special greeting which [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]] used when meeting with friends.<ref name="Second Edition" />

==Behind the scenes==
Drebble is one of the characters appearing in "Tirog's Story", a series of gameplay examples in ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition]]''. His player in "Tirog's Story" is identified as "Steve." Drebble's curious inaction during the firefight in the marketplace is due to Steve's indecision when the Gamemaster (Bill) asks what Drebble is doing.

Drebble also appears in a handful of additional examples of skill use in the rulebook. His reappearance in ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'', where he tries to fix Thannik's ship, is almost identical to a passage in the previous rulebook where Drebble works on Tirog's ship.

If Drebble's statistics are based on the "[[Cyborg/Legends|Cyborged]] Pirate" character template in the second edition rulebook, Drebble is a [[Human/Legends|Human]] with a cybernetic left arm. He dresses in flashy clothes, wears an assortment of gaudy jewelry, and is armed with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]. He also owns a [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]], a [[Environment suit/Legends|vacuum suit]], and may have up to 2000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in cash and other equipment.
